title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone painting a picture. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A teenage girl is painting a picture in an art classroom. She is sitting in front of an easel and holding a paintbrush. There are paints, jars of water and other pictures around her.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing table tennis. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two young men are playing table tennis in a sports centre. One player is hitting the ball while the other is waiting on the opposite side of the table. There are sports bags and benches in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
